age_groups.label: Early Childhood (Ages 3–5)
age_groups.description: Preschool-aged children for early childhood programs such as play-based learning, music, and movement.

age_groups.label: 5 years
age_groups.description: Exact age filter for 5-year-olds in preschool and early childhood programs.

age_groups.label: 7–10 years
age_groups.description: Children ages 7 to 10 for sports, aquatics, and camp programs.

age_groups.label: 8–9 years
age_groups.description: Narrow age band used for specific swim lesson levels and youth classes.

age_groups.label: 13–15 years
age_groups.description: Teen programs including art camps, sports, and leadership activities.

age_groups.label: Adults 18+
age_groups.description: Adult participants for fitness, wellness, and specialty programs.

facilities.name: Riverside Community Center
facilities.description: Full-service community center with gymnasium, multi-purpose rooms, and adjacent indoor pool. Hosts family events and workshops.

facilities.name: Downtown Community Center
facilities.description: Central community hub offering preschool programs, arts classes, and drop-in activities.

facilities.name: Central Gym
facilities.description: Indoor gym facility used for youth basketball, volleyball, and adult drop-in sports.

facilities.name: North Field Complex
facilities.description: Outdoor sports complex with multiple soccer pitches and baseball diamonds. Hosts summer soccer camps.

facilities.name: City Indoor Pool
facilities.description: Heated indoor aquatics facility offering lap swim, lessons, and pool punch passes.

membership_products.name: Monthly Fitness Centre Membership - Off-Peak
membership_products.description: Access to fitness centre and weight room during off-peak hours on weekdays and weekends.

membership_products.name: Monthly Fitness Centre Membership - Standard
membership_products.description: Full-access monthly membership to the municipal fitness centre including cardio and strength areas.

membership_products.name: Monthly Indoor Track Membership
membership_products.description: Access to indoor walking/running track at designated fitness centres.

membership_products.name: Monthly All-Access Family Recreation Membership
membership_products.description: Family membership with access to fitness centres, indoor pools, and public skating for up to 4 household members.

membership_products.name: Annual Fitness Centre Membership
membership_products.description: Discounted 12-month membership for regular fitness centre users.

membership_products.name: 10-Visit Indoor Pool Swim Pass
membership_products.description: Punch pass valid for 10 admissions to any municipal indoor pool public swim session.

membership_products.name: 20-Visit Indoor Pool Swim Pass
membership_products.description: Punch pass valid for 20 visits to indoor pool public and lane swim sessions.

membership_products.name: Single-Visit Indoor Pool Admission
membership_products.description: One-time admission to a public or family swim at any indoor pool.

membership_products.name: Monthly Indoor Pool Membership
membership_products.description: Unlimited access to lane swim and public swim times at indoor pools.

membership_products.name: Annual Indoor Pool Membership
membership_products.description: Year-long unlimited indoor pool access for lane swim, public swim, and select aqua-fit classes.

membership_products.name: Monthly Wellness Plus Membership
membership_products.description: Access to fitness centres plus select drop-in yoga and cycling classes.

participants.notes: Primary account holder and adult participant for fitness classes and passes.
Spouse/partner on the Lee household account.
Eligible for 8–9 year old swim lessons and youth sports programs.
Enjoys soccer camps and youth basketball.
Preschool-aged child for Saturday morning programs.
Teen participant for art camps and youth sports (13–15 age band).

programs.name: Youth Beginner Weekday Swim (Ages 8–9)
programs.description: Introductory weekday swim lessons for children with little or no prior experience. Focus on water safety and basic strokes.

programs.name: Youth Beginner Weekend Swim
programs.description: Beginner swim lessons offered on Saturday and Sunday for school-age children.

programs.name: Youth Intermediate Swim
programs.description: For swimmers who are comfortable in deep water and can swim at least 10 metres unassisted.

programs.name: Adult Lane Swim Training
programs.description: Coached adult swim workouts focusing on technique and endurance for recreational lap swimmers.

programs.name: Evening Adult Yoga
programs.description: Relaxing evening yoga class for adults focusing on flexibility and stress relief.

programs.name: Sunset Vinyasa Yoga
programs.description: Flow-based yoga practice held in the early evening for adults with some prior experience.

programs.name: Evening Indoor Cycling
programs.description: High-energy evening cycling class (spin) set to music, suitable for most fitness levels.

programs.name: Lunchtime Cycle Express
programs.description: Intense 45-minute midday cycling class for adults.

programs.name: Youth Basketball
programs.description: Skill-building basketball program focusing on drills, teamwork, and scrimmages at Central Gym.

programs.name: Summer Soccer Camp
programs.description: Week-long summer soccer camp at North Field Complex featuring drills, games, and mini-tournaments.

programs.name: Teen Morning Art Camp (Spring Break)
programs.description: Half-day morning art camp for teens featuring drawing, painting, and mixed-media projects over spring break.

programs.name: Teen Digital Arts Workshop
programs.description: Introductory workshop exploring digital illustration and basic animation tools for teens.

programs.name: Saturday Preschool Play & Learn
programs.description: Play-based Saturday morning program for preschoolers featuring stories, crafts, and active games.

programs.name: Saturday Preschool Music & Movement
programs.description: Interactive music and movement class for preschoolers held on Saturday mornings.

programs.name: Saturday Preschool Science Sprouts
programs.description: Hands-on Saturday morning science program for curious 4–5 year olds.

programs.name: Family Fun Day at Riverside
programs.description: Free weekend family event at Riverside Community Center with games, crafts, and entertainment.

programs.name: Family Fitness Weekend at Riverside
programs.description: Active family event featuring mini-classes, obstacle courses, and wellness booths.

events.title: Riverside Family Play Day
events.description: Free weekend family event featuring open gym time, inflatables, crafts, and a snack station at Riverside Community Center.

events.title: Riverside Family Art Day
events.description: Drop-in art stations for families including painting, collages, and clay modeling. All supplies provided.

events.title: Riverside Family Game Night
events.description: Board games, cooperative challenges, and trivia for families. Light refreshments included.

events.title: Riverside Family Wellness Fair
events.description: Health and wellness fair with activity stations, mini fitness demos, and community information booths for the whole family.

events.title: Quick Weeknight Cooking Basics
events.description: Hands-on workshop at Riverside Community Center featuring simple weeknight recipes and nutrition tips.

events.title: Intro to Evening Yoga Workshop
events.description: One-night introductory yoga workshop for adults, held in the multi-purpose room at Riverside Community Center.

events.title: Riverside Summer Family Bash
events.description: End-of-summer outdoor party with music, lawn games, and family activities.

events.title: Riverside Winter Family Festival
events.description: Seasonal indoor festival with crafts, performances, and family photo area.

events.title: Saturday Preschool Storytime
events.description: Librarian-led storytime and songs for preschoolers and caregivers at Downtown Community Center.

events.title: Downtown Arts Open House
events.description: Drop-in event showcasing upcoming arts and culture programs with short sample activities.

events.title: Youth 3-on-3 Basketball Tournament
events.description: Single-day 3-on-3 basketball tournament for registered youth teams at Central Gym.

events.title: Community Soccer Jamboree
events.description: Friendly exhibition games and skills contests for youth soccer players at North Field Complex.

events.title: Dive-In Movie Night
events.description: Family-friendly movie shown on a large screen while participants float in the City Indoor Pool.

events.title: Family Fun Swim Meet
events.description: Light-hearted swim meet with family relay races and fun events at City Indoor Pool.

program_sessions.title: Youth Beginner Weekday Swim (Ages 8–9) - 4:00 PM
program_sessions.description: Single-weekday beginner swim lesson at City Indoor Pool for ages 8–9.

program_sessions.title: Youth Beginner Weekday Swim (Ages 8–9) - Mon/Wed 4:00 PM
program_sessions.description: Four-week beginner weekday swim session for ages 8–9, meeting Monday and Wednesday afternoons.

program_sessions.title: Youth Beginner Weekday Swim (Ages 8–9) - Tue/Thu 5:00 PM
program_sessions.description: Beginner weekday swim lessons for ages 8–9 meeting Tuesday and Thursday evenings.

program_sessions.title: Youth Intermediate Swim - Mon/Wed 4:00 PM
program_sessions.description: Intermediate swim lessons for confident swimmers ages 8–12, held Monday and Wednesday afternoons.

program_sessions.title: Evening Adult Yoga - Sun 6:30 PM
program_sessions.description: Single-session evening yoga class for adults 18+ at Riverside Community Center.

program_sessions.title: Evening Adult Yoga - Fri 6:00 PM
program_sessions.description: Relaxing Friday evening yoga class for adults, suitable for beginners and returning participants.

program_sessions.title: Sunset Vinyasa Yoga - Sat 7:00 PM
program_sessions.description: Flow-based evening yoga practice for adults with some prior experience.

program_sessions.title: Evening Indoor Cycling - Fri 7:00 PM
program_sessions.description: High-energy indoor cycling (spin) class held Friday evenings at Central Gym.

program_sessions.title: Evening Indoor Cycling - Sun 6:30 PM
program_sessions.description: Sunday evening spin class designed to kick-start your week.

program_sessions.title: Lunchtime Cycle Express - Thu 12:15 PM
program_sessions.description: Intense 45-minute midday cycling class for adults on their lunch hour.

program_sessions.title: Youth Basketball (Central Gym) - Wed 5:00 PM
program_sessions.description: Youth basketball skills and scrimmage session at Central Gym for ages 9–13.

program_sessions.title: Youth Basketball (Central Gym) - Thu 7:00 PM
program_sessions.description: Later evening youth basketball option at Central Gym for ages 9–13.

program_sessions.title: Youth Basketball (Central Gym) - Sat 11:00 AM
program_sessions.description: Weekend youth basketball session at Central Gym for ages 9–13.

program_sessions.title: Summer Soccer Camp (North Field) - Week 1 Aug 3–7
program_sessions.description: Full-day soccer camp for ages 7–10 at North Field Complex, Monday to Friday.

program_sessions.title: Summer Soccer Camp (North Field) - Week 2 Aug 10–14
program_sessions.description: Second week of full-day soccer camp for ages 7–10 at North Field Complex.

program_sessions.title: Teen Morning Art Camp (Spring Break) - Mar 25–29
program_sessions.description: Half-day morning art camp for teens ages 13–15 running Wednesday to Sunday of spring break.

program_sessions.title: Teen Digital Arts Workshop - Sat 1:00–4:00 PM
program_sessions.description: Afternoon digital arts workshop for teens exploring illustration and basic animation tools.

program_sessions.title: Saturday Preschool Play & Learn - Spring Session
program_sessions.description: Six-week Saturday morning play-based program for preschoolers at Downtown Community Center.

program_sessions.title: Saturday Preschool Music & Movement - Spring Session
program_sessions.description: Interactive music and movement class for preschoolers on Saturday mornings.

program_sessions.title: Saturday Preschool Science Sprouts - Spring Session
program_sessions.description: Hands-on science activities for curious 4–5 year olds on Saturday mornings.
